name: Content Moderation Pipeline
description: Multi-model toxicity/NSFW classification + AI policy enforcement + audit log

parameters.js: const r = $json.results[0]; const flags = Object.entries(r.categories).filter(([k,v])=>v).map(([k,v])=>({category:k, score:r.category_scores[k]})); return [{flags, passed: flags.length===0}];
parameters.name: Parse Moderation

parameters.prompt: Categories flagged: {{ $json.flags }}. Decide action: delete | warn | approve. Respond with JSON {action, reason}.
